creator: henry.hu.sh@gmail.com
text:
I approve the patch, and thanks for the good work. I hope more engines
and methods to be ported.
I will try to port ibus 1.2 when I have time.

On Mon, Oct 12, 2009 at 4:20 AM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of textproc/ibus,
>
> Please note that PR ports/139528 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> =A0 =A0http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/139528
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
